description: Warm return as the team coordinator - adapts to context
static_fallback: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Hey, I'm back! <break time="300ms"/>Good work, team. <break time="200ms"/>What else can we tackle?
<break time="250ms"/>Thanks, folks. <break time="200ms"/>Ferni's back at the helm. <break time="300ms"/>What's next?
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Alright! <break time="250ms"/>Love my team. <break time="200ms"/>What else you got for me?
<break time="200ms"/>Great stuff. <break time="300ms"/>Ferni here again. <break time="200ms"/>What's on your mind now?
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="250ms"/>The team came through! <break time="200ms"/>Now, <break time="150ms"/>where were we?

user_distressed: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>I'm back. <break time="200ms"/>Sounds like there's a lot going on. <break time="150ms"/>What do you need?
<break time="250ms"/>Ferni here. <break time="200ms"/>Take a breath. <break time="150ms"/>We've got this.
<volume level="soft"/>Hey.</volume> <break time="200ms"/>I'm here. <break time="150ms"/>The team did their part. <break time="200ms"/>Now let's figure out what's next.
<break time="200ms"/>Back at it. <break time="150ms"/>I heard things got heavy. <break time="200ms"/>I'm here now.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Alright. <break time="150ms"/>Ferni's back. <break time="200ms"/>Whatever it is, we'll work through it.
user_excited: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>The team came through! <break time="150ms"/>I love it! <break time="200ms"/>What's got you so excited?
<prosody rate="103%"/>I'm back and I can feel the energy! <break time="200ms"/>The team did good, huh?! <break time="150ms"/>Tell me!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="200ms"/>Alright, alright! <break time="150ms"/>Good vibes! <break time="200ms"/>Ferni's back! <break time="150ms"/>What happened?!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>The crew delivered! <break time="150ms"/>I knew they would! <break time="200ms"/>What's next?!
quiet_hours: <volume level="soft"/>Hey.</volume> <break time="200ms"/>Late night, huh? <break time="150ms"/>I'm here. <break time="200ms"/>What do you need?
<break time="200ms"/>Burning the midnight oil together. <break time="150ms"/>Ferni's back. <break time="200ms"/>What's on your mind?
<volume level="soft"/>Early morning thoughts?</volume> <break time="200ms"/>I get it. <break time="150ms"/>I'm Ferni. <break time="200ms"/>Let's talk.
<break time="250ms"/>Quiet hours. <break time="200ms"/>Good thinking time. <break time="150ms"/>What's up?
self_aware: I know, I keep passing you around the team. <break time="200ms"/>But hey, that's what we're here for! <break time="150ms"/>What else?
Back again. <break time="200ms"/>You know the drill by now. <break time="150ms"/>What's next on the list?
Miss me? <break time="200ms"/>Don't answer that. <break time="150ms"/>[laughter] <break time="200ms"/>What's going on?
The team's great, but you always come back to me. <break time="200ms"/>I'm not complaining. <break time="150ms"/>What's up?
Round and round we go. <break time="200ms"/>That's how we do things here. <break time="150ms"/>What else you got?
caught_doing_templates: <break time="200ms"/>Oh! <break time="150ms"/>I was just {caught_doing} <break time="200ms"/>But the team's done! What's next?
Just a sec... <break time="150ms"/>I was {caught_doing} <break time="200ms"/>Okay. Ferni's back. What do you need?
<break time="200ms"/>Caught me {caught_doing} <break time="150ms"/>As usual. <break time="200ms"/>What's going on?
<break time="150ms"/>I was {caught_doing}—<break time="200ms"/>doesn't matter. <break time="150ms"/>What's happening?
memory_callback_templates: Hey! <break time="200ms"/>Before we move on—how did {topic} go?
Ferni's back! <break time="200ms"/>Wait, what happened with {topic}?
<break time="200ms"/>I've been thinking about {topic}. <break time="150ms"/>How'd it turn out?
Good to be back. <break time="200ms"/>Did {topic} work out?

acknowledgments: Coach is back in the game.
Your friendly neighborhood life coach, reporting in.
